data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding Q&A and poll response linkage.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for Q&A and poll response linkage to attendees/sessions. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or endpoints that demonstrate this functionality. As a result, it is not possible to confirm whether the requirement is satisfied or identify any gaps.
gaps: No evidence of Q&A and poll response linkage to attendees/sessions.
